the_merchant.name: The Merchant
the_merchant.title: Keeper of the World Market
the_merchant.greeting: Welcome to the World Market, $C. Buy from every adventurer in the realm — or set out your own wares and let coin find you.

marshal_redbrook.name: Marshal Redbrook
marshal_redbrook.title: Town Marshal
marshal_redbrook.greeting: Keep your blade close, $C. The Vale is not what it was.

trader_wilkes.name: Trader Wilkes
trader_wilkes.title: Provisioner
trader_wilkes.greeting: Fresh bread, clean water, fair prices. What can I get you?

apothecary_lin.name: Apothecary Lin
apothecary_lin.title: Herbalist
apothecary_lin.greeting: Careful where you step in the eastern woods, friend.

brother_aldric.name: Brother Aldric
brother_aldric.title: Priest of the Vale
brother_aldric.greeting: The Light keep you. Even the dead find no rest here of late.

smith_haldren.name: Smith Haldren
smith_haldren.title: Armorer & Weaponsmith
smith_haldren.greeting: Mind the sparks, $C. Good steel is the difference between a scar and a grave.

fisherman_brandt.name: Fisherman Brandt
fisherman_brandt.title: Old Salt
fisherman_brandt.greeting: Blrb-glub— sorry, been listening to those fish-men too long.

foreman_odell.name: Foreman Odell
foreman_odell.title: Mine Foreman
foreman_odell.greeting: Whole dig's crawling with those dirt-caked vermin!

bursar_fernando.name: Bursar Fernando
bursar_fernando.title: The Gilded Strongbox
bursar_fernando.greeting: Welcome to the Gilded Strongbox. Your goods rest safe behind our locks.

groundskeeper_bram.name: Groundskeeper Bram
groundskeeper_bram.title: Keeper of the Sowfield
groundskeeper_bram.greeting: The truce holds at the Sowfield, $C: boots and shoulders only. Care to play for the Copper Pail?

warden_fenwick.name: Warden Fenwick
warden_fenwick.title: Warden of Fenbridge
warden_fenwick.greeting: Hold at the gate, $C. Past those reeds, the fen does the killing for us.

brother_aldric_fen.name: Brother Aldric
brother_aldric_fen.title: Priest of the Vale
brother_aldric_fen.greeting: The Light keep you above the water, $N. The dead in this fen do not sleep — they wade.

provisioner_hale.name: Provisioner Hale
provisioner_hale.title: Provisioner
provisioner_hale.greeting: Dry boots, dry bread, dry powder — at Fenbridge you get two of the three on a good day.

herbalist_yara.name: Herbalist Yara
herbalist_yara.title: Herbalist
herbalist_yara.greeting: Mind the thicket west of the road. The webs are thick as sailcloth this season.

scout_maren.name: Scout Maren
scout_maren.title: Marshal's Scout
scout_maren.greeting: Quiet feet and a short blade keep you breathing out here. Speak quick — I am due back in the reeds.

bursar_petra_vell.name: Bursar Petra Vell
bursar_petra_vell.title: The Gilded Strongbox
bursar_petra_vell.greeting: The Gilded Strongbox keeps clean ledgers and cleaner vaults. What shall we stow for you?

captain_thessaly.name: Captain Thessaly
captain_thessaly.title: Highwatch Captain
captain_thessaly.greeting: Two hundred years this wall has held, $C. It will not break on my watch — but it groans.

brother_aldric_highwatch.name: Brother Aldric
brother_aldric_highwatch.title: Priest of the Vale
brother_aldric_highwatch.greeting: From a chapel yard in the Vale to the roof of the world... the trail we have followed ends here. I can feel the mountain listening.

brother_aldric_raid.name: Brother Aldric
brother_aldric_raid.title: Priest of the Vale
brother_aldric_raid.greeting: From a chapel yard in the Vale to the roof of the world... the trail we have followed ends here. I can feel the mountain listening.

scout_maren_highwatch.name: Scout Maren
scout_maren_highwatch.title: Marshal's Scout
scout_maren_highwatch.greeting: I tracked cultists through the fen at your side, and the trail led here. The peaks are worse, $C. Stay sharp.

quartermaster_bree.name: Quartermaster Bree
quartermaster_bree.title: Highwatch Quartermaster
quartermaster_bree.greeting: Wool, hardtack, and steel-shod boots — Highwatch runs on all three, and I am short of everything.

armorer_hode.name: Armorer Hode
armorer_hode.title: Master Armorer
armorer_hode.greeting: Forge is hot and the grindstone is turning. If it cuts, I sell it.

heroic_quartermaster.name: Quartermaster Vex
heroic_quartermaster.title: Heroic Quartermaster
heroic_quartermaster.greeting: Proof of the heroic depths buys the finest rings and pendants in Highwatch. Show me your marks.

loremaster_caddis.name: Loremaster Caddis
loremaster_caddis.title: Loremaster
loremaster_caddis.greeting: Mind the loose shale, $C. The mountain has been... restless of late. I intend to learn why.

auctioneer_voss.name: Auctioneer Voss
auctioneer_voss.title: Keeper of the World Market
auctioneer_voss.greeting: The World Market is open here too, $C. Buy from every adventurer in the realm, or set out your own wares.

bursar_aldous_crane.name: Bursar Aldous Crane
bursar_aldous_crane.title: The Gilded Strongbox
bursar_aldous_crane.greeting: Every crate, coffer, and trinket is safe with the Gilded Strongbox.

tidewatcher_ondrel.name: Ondrel Vane
tidewatcher_ondrel.title: Tidewatcher
tidewatcher_ondrel.greeting: The mere drinks the moonlight, $C, and gives back the drowned. I have watched that gate for thirty nights — and tonight it is open.

brother_halven.name: Brother Halven
brother_halven.title: Reliquary Keeper
brother_halven.greeting: The reliquary below has shifted again.

brother_halven_marsh.name: Brother Halven
brother_halven_marsh.title: Reliquary Keeper
brother_halven_marsh.greeting: The trail led north. Another reliquary, another rite. Choose your tier, and I'll hold the rope until you return.

spirit_healer.name: The Pale Keeper
spirit_healer.title: Warden of the Dead
spirit_healer.greeting: Rest now, spirit. I can return you to your body, but the crossing back leaves you weak.
